title: Farmers Craft
body:
# FARMERSCRAFT
![discontinued](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6223af97622f53d1dc67e91bb40f7fcf52c974e3.png)
a modpack all about being a farmer

tend to your crops and create an amazing farm

# features

## -seasons

look out for seasons as certain crops grow faster during different times of the year

## -many more crops

there are new trees, crops and bushes added to this modpack so the possibilities of farming are endless.

## -diets

in order to be healthy you need to maintain a diet eating all differnt types of food instead of just one type.
